description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, codequality, and security. In the build stage add a job named build that uses the ruby:2.6 image, runs `gem install bundler --no-document` then `bundle update`, and saves Gemfile.lock as an artifact. In the codequality stage add a job named rubocop that also uses ruby:2.6, runs `gem install rubocop rubocop-performance --no-document` followed by `rubocop`. In the security stage add a job named dependency_scanning that uses the docker:stable image with the docker:stable-dind service, sets the variable DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay2, runs `export SP_VERSION=$(echo "$CI_SERVER_VERSION" | sed 's/^\([0-9]*\)\.\([0-9]*\).*/\1-\2-stable/')` and then `docker run --env DEP_SCAN_DISABLE_REMOTE_CHECKS="${DEP_SCAN_DISABLE_REMOTE_CHECKS:-false}" --volume "$PWD:/code" --volume /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock "registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/security-products/dependency-scanning:$SP_VERSION" /code`, depends on the build job, and uploads gl-dependency-scanning-report.json as an artifact.
